name: Snowflake Rosettes
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the eggs until just before they begin to foam.
2. Gradually add milk to the beaten eggs, mixing continuously.
3. Slowly incorporate the all-purpose flour into the egg mixture, stirring constantly.
4. Continue beating until the batter is smooth and free of lumps.
5. Add sugar, salt, and vanilla extract to the batter, whisking well to combine.
6. Heat oil in a deep fryer or heavy-based frying pan to 175°C (350°F).
7. Dip the iron into the hot oil to preheat it.
8. Carefully lower the batter into the hot oil using a piping bag or small spoon.
9. Fry the rosettes one at a time until they are golden brown, about 2-3 minutes per side.
10. Remove the fried rosettes with a slotted spoon and drain on paper towels.
11. Sprinkle granulated sugar over the hot rosettes while still in the pan for added sweetness.
Nutritional information per serving (without oil):
34 calories; 1 gram protein, 5 grams carbohydrates, 1 gram fat (22%), 0.1 grams fiber, 19mg cholesterol, 33mg sodium
